description: A large rectangular loop route around several blocks in SF. The loop perimeter is the path; the interiorPoint is geometrically deep inside the rectangle (far from any edge) so the route never passes through it. Model A (path coverage) should NOT capture the interior cell — only cells the path actually crosses.

interiorPoint._note: Center of the large rectangle. Well inside all four edges, the perimeter path cannot cross this cell under model A at res-9.

points._note: NE corner — east along north edge (~1.5 km)
SE corner — south along east edge (~2.2 km)
SW corner — west along south edge (~1.5 km)
NW corner again — north along west edge, completing the loop
